creator: sysadmin@mfn.org
text:
We have noticed this as well, under 2.2.5-R.  The only indication we ahve
seen *reliably* is that the NFS clients seem to hang in state NFSAIO.  In
addition, we have noticed a great deal of "nfs server ... not responding"
messages which are *immediately* followed by "nfs server ok" messages.  These
appear so fast as to have the same timestamps, yet the clients are still
in NFSAIO, and the file systems are unresponsive.
